name: Spa Torralbenc (Natura Bissé rituals)
description: On a 74-hectare working farm among vineyards, the Torralbenc spa offers massages and rituals with Natura Bissé skincare. Open to non-guests too: a serene, indulgent pause facing the Menorcan countryside.

highlights: Massages and facial and body rituals with Natura Bissé products
The Torralbenc massage, with rosemary and lavender oils from the estate itself
Yoga and pilates retreats in season, among the vines and countryside
